content: Socket.io: use namespaces to separate distinct server-side concerns with different auth/middleware (e.g. /admin vs /team), and rooms for dynamic transient grouping (e.g. one room per team, broadcast to all via io.emit or io.to(room)). Rooms are server-side only; client cannot join directly. socket.emit('event', ...) to sender, io.to(room).emit(...) to a room excluding/including sender via 'to' vs 'in'.
